title: OHP ASSISTER - 211info
text: EUVALCREE HERMISTON OHP ASSISTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Assists with Medicaid enrollment and provides information about the Oregon Health Insurance Marketplace. 236 E Newport Avenue Hermiston, OR 97838 Eligibility: Low-income Oregon residents Hours: Monday-Friday 10am-6pm Email (541) 567-1185 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 567-1185 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call, or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Photo ID, proof of income, and proof of address LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, Mam AREA SERVED: Baker, Malheur, Morrow, Umatilla, and Union Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Services: Navigator Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: FOOD - FOOD PANTRY If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. EUVALCREE HERMISTON
